title: trifolium fragiferum var. fragiferum
intro: Trifolium fragiferum var. fragiferum, also known as strawberry clover, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to relieve digestive issues, such as irritable bowel syndrome and diarrhea, due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of strawberry clover include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve gut health, and provide antioxidant properties, making it a promising natural remedy for various health concerns. Herbal preparations of strawberry clover, such as teas and infusions, can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
